ogtitle: Call us from the NAB app
content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat     Contact Us     Call us from the NAB app   Call us from the NAB app   Contact NAB by logging into the NAB app’s secure environment. A banker can help with your personal and business enquiries. Learn how today.    Reasons to call us from the NAB app   Skip the questions   When you log into the NAB app, you’re already identified and can skip the initial identification questions.    *  View Disclaimer 1    Save time   When calling us from the NAB app, we’ll have your details in front of us as soon as you’re connected.    Get the right support   The app menu is simple to use and helps direct you to the right team for your personal or business banking needs.    How it works   When you call us from the NAB app, a unique number will appear on screen. This number will take you to your phone app and enable you to come through already authenticated.    You’ll need the latest version of the NAB app installed and a compatible iOS or Android mobile device.         Log into the NAB app.       Tap the Search icon.       Search for ‘call’.       Tap Contact us.    Not registered yet? Download the NAB app today.    Please note, calls are made from your device’s usual calling app. Call charges may apply.    Other contact options   NAB Messaging   NAB Messaging is here to answer your banking questions. Use our virtual assistant for your everyday questions 24 hours, 7 days a week. If you need more help, you can chat to a NAB banker during business hours.    Learn how NAB Messaging works    Indigenious customer service   We have a dedicated customer service line for Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander customers, particularly those living in remote locations. Call us today for help with your banking enquiries.    Call the indigenous customer line    All contact options   If you prefer not to message us or call using the app, visit our contact page. Explore contact details for media enquiries, fraud and scams, financial assistance and more.    Contact us    Interpreters available   Do you have limited English or prefer to speak in a language other than English? When you call us, just say “I need an interpreter” and we’ll arrange for someone to help with your enquiry.    If you don’t see your language listed, please ask us for help to find someone who speaks your language to help with your banking.      普通话    한국어     Italiano , opens in new window    日本語   View more languages   National Relay Service   If you’re d/Deaf or find it hard to hear or speak to hearing people on the phone, the National Relay Service, opens in new window    can help. To contact NAB give our phone number 13 22 65 to the National Relay Service operator when asked.      National Relay Service phone numbers and links , opens in new window    National Relay Service options    Learn more about accessibility at NAB   Important information         Disclaimer 1   There may be some enquiry types where we still need to verify your identity.    This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.    Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.   Consider the NAB Internet Banking terms and conditions which apply when using the NAB app. The NAB app is compatible with Android  and iOS, minimum platform requirements apply. Android is a trademark of Google LLC. IOS is a trademark or registered trademark of Cisco in the U.S. and other countries and is used under license.
